meaning: n.鎳婃倲,鑷矗,鍚屾儏,鎬滄偗
examples: I felt guilty and full of remorse.
He seemed to feel no remorse at all.
He was full of remorse and asked Beatrice what he could do to make amends.
Lerner said he was sending Moton home and she has shown remorse for her crimes.
Instead, he produces the admission of remorse from Avery in a long scene with a psychiatrist.
